title: Harris 10630 3-Inch Transform Wood Stain and Varnish Brush - Green
features: Designed specifically for wood care tasks
For use with woodstains, oils and varnishes
Excellent bend recovery. Leaves a fine finish
Ideal for transforming interior and exterior wooden furniture
description: The Harris Transform 3" Woodstain and Varnish brush is designed specifically for wood care tasks. For use with woodstains, oils and varnishes, this brush has excellent bend recovery and leaves a fine finish. Ideal for transforming interior and exterior wooden furniture such as chairs, tables, cupboards and stairs.
